title: Favorite Supporting Characters
wikitext:
[]: Favorite Supporting Characters             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jul 07, 2009 9:22 am What are some of your favorite supporting characters in Evangelion? My favorite is Maya, mostly because of her voice(dub).

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 07, 2009 10:04 am I really liked Hikari and Touji. I wish they were able to develop their relationship more.

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Tue Jul 07, 2009 10:08 am Shigeru Aoba and Fuyutsuki actually top my list of favorite characters in the whole series. Shigeru got all of my respect when he opened his drawer in EoE and pulled out a submachine gun (I've always wanted to do that), and Fuyutsuki's just a badass no matter how you look at him--all those metaphysical ramblings in EoE and the Fuyutsuki Flashback Episode prove it.

[]:             Quote Post by FrostyS » Tue Jul 07, 2009 10:49 am Toji. no question.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Tue Jul 07, 2009 11:12 am Kensuke. He often provided some needed comic relief, and if you think about it, if he hadn't done what he did in episode 3, Toji and Shinji would have *never* gotten along. Or at least not for a while, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Squirrel Ninja » Tue Jul 07, 2009 11:46 am I really started liking Fuyutsuki during episode 21. Hearing him do that narration is one of the high points of the dub.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Tue Jul 07, 2009 12:40 pm Kozo Fuyutsuki, has nerves of steel, 'nuff said...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jul 07, 2009 2:19 pm Most of them, really. Kozo is the guy I identify with most (and not just because he's a contemporary of mine). Maya, Hyuga and Hikari are the other ones I think of as "I liked them".

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Jul 07, 2009 2:45 pm Makoto Hyuga is one of my favorites. He is always doing something whether its picking up laundry, sneaking information, or just reading. Another favorite of mine would be Aoba, goofily playing his invisible guitar.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Tue Jul 07, 2009 2:56 pm Kozo Fuyutsuki

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Tue Jul 07, 2009 3:28 pm Fuyutsuki was a pretty good character. He was really only brought out in that mega-flashback episode though. And yes, the part where Aoba pulled out the SMG from his desk was pretty badass.

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Tue Jul 07, 2009 6:02 pm I love the bridge-bunnies, but Fuyutski is the man.

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Tue Jul 07, 2009 6:34 pm Kensuke is my favorite mainly because he kind of reminds me of me with the whole obsessed with the military thing.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Jul 07, 2009 8:28 pm Fuyutski - Why? In EoE his eyes became SUPER-SQUINTY and he actually had a lot of awesome dialouge Aoba - He air guitars. He has long, silky hair. He says "How the hell should I know?" He is made of win.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Tue Jul 07, 2009 9:40 pm Fuyutski is awesome, just because he is. And Aoba is cool too, mostly due to the aforementioned sub-machine gun in the drawer. And for calling Maya an idiot when she wouldn't shoot back. Toji and Hikari are both good characters, too. I don't know I pretty much just like every single character in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by snowballreborn » Tue Jul 07, 2009 10:09 pm I hate makoto hyuga but I love Shigeru Aoba!

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Jul 07, 2009 10:17 pm Kensuke, full stop. Toji too.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 07, 2009 10:18 pm Toji and Kaworu mhmm theyre my fave characters too I think they both had potential to grow farther as characters before they were

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Wed Jul 08, 2009 12:00 am yeah, Aoba is pretty cool to, but i guess the reason that most (including me) pick Kozo Fuyutsuki is because he simply has more screen time than Aoba, infact, the air-guitar thing is shown less than 3 seconds and the only episode where he actaully does something is not even an episode but the EoE movie,

[]:             Quote Post by snowballreborn » Wed Jul 08, 2009 12:07 am Fuyutsuki is pretty cool too
